description_long: This helmet features a futuristic, tactical design with a predominantly black, glossy exterior and angular contours. The front is equipped with a large, dark-tinted full-face visor that provides extensive facial coverage and likely enhanced visibility. Integrated into the sides are circular, vent-like structures with blue accents, possibly for communication or ventilation, and there are several visible panels, seams, and embedded components suggesting advanced technology. The top and rear of the helmet display additional molded details, including raised sections and what appear to be reinforced protective zones. Subtle red highlights and blue illuminated elements add to the high-tech aesthetic, while the overall build suggests robust protection suitable for urban or tactical environments. The helmet appears to be constructed from advanced composite materials, with a focus on both durability and user comfort.
description: A high-tech, black helmet with a full-face dark visor, blue and red illuminated accents, and angular, reinforced panels for advanced protection.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, dark-tinted visor dominating the face area, with angular black panels and subtle red highlights above.
description_view_1: Left-side view reveals the circular blue-accented vent, multiple panel seams, and detailed molded features along the side and top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the helmet's reinforced back, blue illuminated dots, and raised protective sections, with no visor visible.
description_view_3: Right-side view mirrors the left, showing the circular vent, blue accents, and complex paneling, with the visor edge partially visible.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two large circular vents on each side with blue slats, no visible top or rear vents.
